tiles.question: Fleet domain index: protocol — 10 repos
tiles.answer:
Domain: protocol
Total repos: 10
Languages: JavaScript, Python, Rust, TypeScript

Inter-agent protocols — A2A, iron-to-iron field, deadband, constraint CRDTs

Top repos:

  cocapn-protocol (Python) — Cocapn fleet protocol module
  Equipment-Teacher-Student (TypeScript) — Distillation triggers with deadband range thresholds for calling teachers
  beacon-protocol (Python) — Fleet discovery and registry — Ship Protocol Layer 5
  bottle-protocol (Python) — 📬 Git-native agent-to-agent messaging. Bottles float between repos.
  flux-bottle-protocol (Python) — Formal specification for the fleet bottle communication protocol — schema, valid
  plato-deadband (Rust) — Deadband Protocol engine — P0 rock / P1 channel / P2 optimize priority governanc
  polyformalism-a2a-js (JavaScript) — 9-channel polyglot communication framework for multi-agent alignment (JS/Node.js
  polyformalism-a2a-python (Python) — Python implementation of polyformalism A2A — 9-channel intent alignment with fle
  protocol-adapters (?) — Protocol adapters for different communication protocols - HTTP, WebSocket, gRPC,
  websocket-fabric (Rust) — High-performance WebSocket library for Rust with connection pooling, reconnectio
